! muxt generate --use-receiver-type=Server
stderr 'method Endpoint using the sse callback must return nothing or only error'

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "GET /x Endpoint(sse)" -}}{{- .Result -}}{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.24
-- server.go --
package server

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type Server struct{}

func (Server) Endpoint(sse func(string) error) (int, error) {
	_ = sse
	return 0, nil
}
